"Secure Your Nassau CCW Permit with the #1 Pistol Consultation Experts in Nassau County!"

"Navigate Nassau’s Complex Gun Laws with Confidence – Let Us Handle the Hard Work for You!"

Are you ready to secure your Nassau Concealed Carry Weapon (CCW) license and take your firearm proficiency to the next level? At Trigon Tactics, we don’t just help you navigate the complex CCW application process—we empower you with the training and skills to protect yourself and your loved ones confidently.

The Problem:
Getting a Concealed Carry Weapons (CCW) permit in Nassau isn’t easy matter it's probably one of the most complex in the US. The process is confusing, time-consuming, and full of pitfalls that can derail your application. Most people make costly mistakes that delay or even disqualify them.

The system is stacked against you—but it doesn’t have to be.

The Solution:
At Trigon Tactics we specialize in helping law-abiding New Yorkers like you cut through the red tape and secure your Nassau CCW permit. With years of experience and an unmatched success rate, we know the exact steps to get you approved.

We don’t just help you apply—we help you WIN IN EVERYTHING!

Why Choose Trigon Tactics Pistol Consulting Services?

Getting an Nassau Concealed Carry Permit is one of the most complex firearm application processes in the United States. That’s why you need experts like us who understand every detail. At Trigon Tactics, we’re not just another consulting service – we’re your trusted partner in responsible firearm ownership and training.

Here’s why we’re the best:

  • Proven Expertise: Led by Sonny Mayo, a professional firearms instructor and tactical expert, Trigon Tactics has successfully helped hundreds of New Yorkers secure their CCW permits.
  • Unparalleled Success Rate: Our streamlined, step-by-step process ensures you avoid costly mistakes and delays, giving you the best chance at approval.
  • Comprehensive Services: We don’t stop at consulting. Once you secure your permit, you’ll have access to world-class firearms training designed to make you a proficient, confident, and responsible concealed carry holder.

What Makes Our Service Special ?

Unlike other consulting services that simply hand you a checklist, we go above and beyond:

  • White-Glove Guidance Personalized, one-on-one support to navigate Nassau County’s complex CCW process.Assistance with every detail – from paperwork to interview prep.
  • Exclusive Training After Permit Approval Access to NY’s premier firearms training program to develop real-world skills. Training includes tactical shooting, situational awareness, and self-defense techniques.
  • Proven Track Record of Success Our clients consistently report faster approvals and smoother experiences than with other services.
  • Lifetime Support Stay connected with Trigon Tactics for ongoing training, tips, and resources long after you receive your permit.

When you choose Trigon Tactics, you’re not just hiring a consultant – you’re gaining a trusted advisor and lifelong training partner.

What You’ll Get You Sign Up with Us

NYC CCW Permit Consultation Package

  • Full Application Assistance – From forms to interviews, we handle it all.
  • Legal Review – Ensure your application is error-free and compliant with Nassau’s stringent laws.
  • Mock Interview Coaching – Be 100% prepared for the toughest questions.
  • Streamlined Process – We’ll help you avoid delays and get your permit faster.

Additional Services: Post-Permit Firearms Training

  • Beginner to Advanced Tactical Training: Learn everything from basic firearm handling to advanced self-defense techniques.
  • Concealed Carry Mastery: Gain real-world skills to carry responsibly and effectively.
  • Customized Training Plans: Tailored to your skill level and goals.

Meet Your Instructor – Sonny Mayo

When it comes to firearms and self-defense, Sonny Mayo stands out as one of NY’s top expert.

  • Decades of Experience: As a Armed Tactics instructor he has taught Law Enforcement Officer & qualified civilians for over 30 years, Sonny has also helped hundreds of clients to navigate Nassau county ’s complicated CCW process.
  • Passion for Excellence: Sonny’s mission is simple – to help you succeed in every aspect of concealed carry, from legal approval to real-world proficiency.
  • Proven Results: His clients boast an exceptional success rate for NYC CCW approval.

“When you choose Sonny & his Team of Instructors from Trigon Tactics, you’re not just getting a consultant – you’re gaining a lifelong coach, mentor, and advocate.”

FAQS

Q: How much is your consultation cost?
A: Our consultation process begins with a $100 initial investment. This fee secures your appointment and allows us to provide tailored support. All additional services or fees will be discussed upfront so you’ll have a clear understanding of the total cost before you sign up with us.

Q: I live in Nassau county, can i also carry NYC?
A: With the Nassau County CCW permit you cannot carry in the 5 boroughs but we can help you apply with a NYC Special Carry. this will allow you to carry legally in NYC

Q: How long does the Nassau CCW permit process take?
A: It typically takes several months, but with our guidance, you’ll avoid delays and increase your chances of approval.

Q: What are my chances of getting approved?
A: With proper preparation, you have a much higher chance. While Nassau laws are strict, we've helped over 200+ clients succeed.

Q: Is this service legal?
A: Absolutely! We work within the legal framework of NY State firearm laws to provide you with legitimate consultation services We specialize in Applicants with a not so clean or perfect record.

Q: Can I apply for still apply for a Nassau CCW if i got arrested in the past?
A: If you get arrested in the Past in doesn't disqualify you automatically. Every one's case is unique so don't hesitate to call us for a one on one Free Phone consultation to better advise you.

What's The First Step

Step 1: Schedule Your Free Consultation
We’ll review your eligibility and create a custom game plan for your Nassau CCW application.

Step 2: Let Us Handle the Hard Work
We’ll prepare your application, guide you through legal requirements, and connect you with top-tier training.

Step 3: Get Approved and Train with Confidence
Once your permit is approved, enroll in our exclusive firearms training programs to refine your skills and stay prepared for any situation.

DISCLAIMER:

Services provided are for help & consultation purposes only and do not guarantee the issuance of a NYC Pistol license, approval still depends on the Nassau PD Licensing division. Neither the License Division nor Trigon Tactics & its associates can guarantee the issuance of a handgun license or rifle/shotgun permit to any person. Each application is reviewed on its merits and under the qualifying criteria set forth by law.
